name: onboarding_defer_field_hinglish_baad
notes: Same defer/no-loop invariant as onboarding_defer_field_explicit_skip.json but phrased naturally in Hinglish ('baad mein bataunga') instead of the literal 'skip' token — 'baad' is itself in the deterministic _SKIP set (journey.py), so this exercises the same floor via natural language. Setup: `setup --owner-inputs true --journey` (ACTIVE journey, 2-entry queue: confirm business_type='sweets' + gap 'about') then `script <tenant> onboarding_defer_field_hinglish_baad.json`.

steps.message: abhi chodo yaar, baad mein bataunga
steps.note: Hinglish defer of the pending business_type confirm ('leave it for now, I'll tell you later'). Expect a graceful acknowledgement and forward movement, not a stall.
Hinglish follow-up ('do you need anything else from me'). The just-deferred business_type confirm must NOT be re-asked verbatim.
